segments.text: Remember David, O LORD, and all his afflictions,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: how he swore to the LORD and vowed to the Mighty One of Jacob:
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will not enter my house or get into my bed,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will not give sleep to my eyes or slumber to my eyelids,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: until I find a place for the LORD, a dwelling place for the Mighty One of Jacob.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Behold, we heard of it in Ephrathah;
we found it in the fields of Jaar.
Let us go to his dwelling place; let us worship at his footstool!
segments.speaker: Worshippers

segments.text: Arise, O LORD, and go to your resting place, you and the ark of your might.
segments.speaker: Worshippers

segments.text: Let your priests be clothed with righteousness, and let your saints shout for joy.
segments.speaker: Worshippers

segments.text: For the sake of your servant David, do not turn away the face of your anointed one.
segments.speaker: Worshippers

segments.text: The LORD swore to David a sure oath from which he will not turn back: 'One of the sons of your body I will set on your throne.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: If your sons keep my covenant and my testimonies that I shall teach them, their sons also forever shall sit on your throne.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For the LORD has chosen Zion; he has desired it for his dwelling place:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: 'This is my resting place forever; here I will dwell, for I have desired it.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will abundantly bless her provisions; I will satisfy her poor with bread.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Her priests I will clothe with salvation, and her saints will shout for joy.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: There I will make a horn to sprout for David; I have prepared a lamp for my anointed one.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: His enemies I will clothe with shame, but on him his crown will shine.
segments.speaker: God
